entries.summary: Phase 6 completed: All 5 tasks verified and aligned. Task 6.1 updated docstring branding, Task 6.2 fixed OpenVINO references to GGUF, Task 6.3 updated Inno Setup placeholders with explicit CHANGE_ME pattern and TODO comments, Task 6.4 added measurement conditions to performance claims, Task 6.5 made context_truncation configurable via RAG_CONTEXT_TRUNCATION environment variable.
